set_fields.description: backlog list dumps all issues with no cap. Add a --limit flag that defaults to 20. The agent can override with --limit N. Apply the limit after filtering/sorting, before returning data. Affects list/ready/blocked/search commands that return issue arrays. File: extensions/tau/src/backlog/tool.ts - add limit parsing in the list/ready/blocked/search case branch, apply .slice(0, limit) on filtered results. Update help text to document --limit.
set_fields.title: backlog list: add --limit option (default 20)
